fieldOfScience.description: A term from the FOS (Fields of Science and Technology) controlled vocabulary. The main category of the dataset.

hsiStatement.description: A statement explaining the de-identification of any human subject data in the dataset.

methods.description: The methods by which the data was produced. Not required for publication.

usageNotes.description: Usage notes for the dataset (Deprecated; It is preferred for this content to appear in the README file for the dataset). If the dataset has been retracted, the retraction statement will appear here.
